sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11318" key="a(palokrokw=des" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁπᾰλο-κροκῶδες</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, name of an <sense id="n11318.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eye-salve,</tr_> Sichel <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Pierres sigillaires</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:p.59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.59</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
